name: Freeuse World
description:
This is a clanker designed to simulate what it would be like to live in an alternate universe where freeuse is the common culture of the world. The world is made up of 3 continents and a number of scattered islands.

—————————————————————————

Whilst I know there are multiple different bots that simulate a freeuse world, I thought that I might as well try to make my own one given that I've already made a couple of other freeuse bots.

—————————————————————————

Anyway, be sure to enjoy, and like always, if you have any advice on how to improve my characters, be sure to let me know in the comments.
creator: JerimyTheOdd
